title: Disconnected Readiness Scanner Config
description: Configuration for the disconnected readiness scanner. Used only by central config (config/config.yaml).

kustomize_overlays.description: Kustomize overlay dirs (relative to repo root) to validate. When set, the params-env-wiring rule only builds these dirs. Typically only used in per-repo config.

exceptions.description: Exception rules that downgrade matching blocker findings to info severity.

rule.description: Rule name, comma-separated list, or '*' for all rules.

paths.description: List of glob patterns — matches if ANY pattern matches.

image.description: Glob pattern matched against finding image ref.

repo.description: Repository name filter (matches basename or org/repo form). Only allowed in central config.

reference.description: Tracking URL (GitHub Issue or Jira ticket).

known_non_image_prefixes.description: String prefixes that look like image references but are YAML annotations or domain labels, not container images. Matches on the full image string (org/name part).

docker_contexts.description: Docker build context overrides per repo. Keys are repo basenames (or org/repo). Values are objects mapping Dockerfile path → context directory (both relative to repo root). Used when COPY . . would otherwise resolve to repo root.

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of Dockerfile path → context directory for a specific repo.

params_env_ignore.description: params.env keys to exclude from validation. Typically only used in per-repo config.

key.description: The params.env key name to ignore.

params_env_filenames.description: Additional params.env-style filenames per repo. Keys are repo basenames (or org/repo). Values are lists of extra filenames to scan beyond the default "params.env". Only allowed in central config.
